basic_details.job_title: DMHO Kamareddy Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 14 Lab Technician and STLS Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Medical & Health Officer, Kamareddy (DMHO Kamareddy) Lab Technician/Sputum Microscopist and Senior Tuberculosis Laboratory Supervisor (STLS) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of DMHO Kamareddy. A total of 14 vacancies have been announced through the DMHO Kamareddy Recruitment 2026.

application_fee.details: Rs. 500/- (Five Hundred Only) for all candidates via Demand Draft in favour of "DIST MEDICAL AND HEALTH OFFICER KMR".

qualification.details: Age Limit (as on 01.06.2026): Minimum 18 years, Maximum 44 years. | SCs, STs & BCs: 5 years relaxation Ex-servicemen: 3 years + length of service Disabled persons: 10 years relaxation | Educational Qualifications: | Lab Technician/Sputum Microscopist: Intermediate (10+2) + Diploma/Certified course in Medical Laboratory Technology or equivalent. Preferential: 1 year NTEP experience or sputum smear microscopy skills. | Senior Tuberculosis Laboratory Supervisor (STLS): Graduate or Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology + Permanent two-wheeler driving license + Certificate course in computer operations (min. 2 months). Preferential: Minimum 1 year NTEP experience.

salary_details.details: Lab Technician/Sputum Microscopist: Rs. 27,300/- per month Senior Tuberculosis Laboratory Supervisor (STLS): Rs. 22,100/- per month

selection_process: Merit-based: 90 marks on qualifying exam + 10 marks for age. Total 100 marks. Rule of reservation and presidential order followed.
how_to_apply: Submit by 30.06.2026, 05:00 PM at DM&HO Office, Room No.105, 1st Floor, IDOC, Kamareddy.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for DMHO Kamareddy Lab Technician and STLS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date is 30 June 2026 by 05:00 PM. Applications received later will not be entertained.How many vacancies are there?

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there?
faq.answer: There are 14 vacancies – 7 for Lab Technician/Sputum Microscopist and 7 for STLS.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for DMHO Kamareddy Lab Technician and STLS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Rs. 500/- via Demand Draft in favour of DIST MEDICAL AND HEALTH OFFICER KMR.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for DMHO Kamareddy Lab Technician and STLS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: 18 to 44 years as on 01.06.2026, with applicable relaxations for reserved categories, ex-servicemen, and disabled persons.

faq.question: Q5. Is online application available?
faq.answer: No, it is offline submission only at the DM&HO office in Kamareddy.
